titleStmt.title: SII 17.449: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 449. (A.R. No. 419 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāranvēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Vṛiśchika, ba [6], Friday, Maghā, correspond to 1181 A.D., October 30.

This records the gift of 150 aṉṟāḍunaṟkāśu by Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ Nagara Īśuvaramuḍaiyān alias Vīraśiṅgapaṉmar of Guṇamalaippuram in Veṇṇi-kkūṟṟam of Śutta mali-vaḷanāḍu for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār. The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple agreed to maintain the lamp, by the interest on the endowed amount, with one ulakku of ghee daily by the measure vēdavaṉa-nāyakaṉ.
The height of the lamp including the pedestal and the top portion is given as the length (of) four fingers.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅ
kacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu viruccika nāyaṟṟu Aparapa
kṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum veḷḷik kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ Umpaḷanāṭṭu
k kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkkuc cuttamali vaḷanāṭṭu ve
ṇṇik kūṟṟattuk kuṇamalaippāṭi Uṭaiyānāṉa koṇṭāṉ nakara
Īcuvaramuṭaiyānāṉa viraciṅkapaṉmar cantirātittavaṟ cella vaitta tirunuṉ
tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟ civappirāmmaṇak kāṇi Uṭaiya gavutamaṉ Umaiyā
ḻvāṉ Ātittatevaṉāṉa tirumaṟaikkāṭu paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi kaṅkai koṇṭā nāṉa A
ṇaṭamuṟanimirnta paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu Uṭaiyān maruntāṉa nāyakar te
vapaṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭānāṉa Irācarācapaṭṭaṉu
m Ikkottirattu Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ māṇikka kūttaṉum Ikkottirat
tu Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Ātittatevaṉāṉa Etirilicoḻa paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu vetavaṉa muṭai
yāṉ piḷḷanāṉa vikkirama coḻa paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu Ātittaṉ Antiyarkāla ketiyāṉa kuṉṟūr
nāṭṭu paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattu tevaṉ perumānāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉum Ikko
ttirattu tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyāṉ Āḷuṭaiyānāṉa kolottuṅka paṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ
tiruvaiyyāṟu ṭuṭaiyāṉ perumānāṉa vetavaṉanāyaka paṭṭaṉum gomayantan muttāṉa
tevaṉāṉa Ālālacuntara paṭṭaṉum pārattuvāci piccaṉ cūṟṟiyāṉa Uta ṅkapaṭṭaṉu
m Ikkottirattu pañcaneti pirānāṉa Ātitta paṭṭaṉum Ikkottirattuttirucciṟṟampa
lamuṭaiyāṉ caṅkara(n)ṉāṉa tirumaṟaikkāṭu paṇṭitanum Ivva Uḷḷiṭṭa maṟṟu
m muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Ikkuṇamalaippāṭi yār ka
ṅkaikoṇṭān nakara Īcuramuṭaiyānāṉa viraciṅkapaṉmar pakkal poṉ koṇ
ṭu poli Ūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 100 5 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟaimpa
tum kaikkoṇṭu mutal niṟkakaṭavatākavum policaikku vetavaṉa nāyakaṉāle
ḻakku neyyāka vaṉta ney Aḷa ṭṭa pittaḷaik kutti viḷakku piṭamum talaiyu
tāṅki muṉṟum Uṭpaṭa ṇu nālviral niḷattu kuttu tiruvaṇukkaṉ tiru vi
tirātittavaṟ cāśvatikamāka Erikkak kaṭavomāka sammatittom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 17.449 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
